text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Are my eyes deceivin' me, or is that a
grilled squid stall?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross suddenly gets excited as we pass
by the station.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Now that's somethin' ya don't see here too often! People in Tokyo usually just grill the whole thing skewered on a stick!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: All right, lemme grab a quick bite...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Actually, hold on... If I eat this now, I won't have
any space for dinner later...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But I could save it for tonight, and have it as a
bedtime snack! We could squeeze that into my
diet, right Trainer?
choice_data_list:
No, it's not good to eat right before going to
bed.
Sure. It's not good to suppress your cravings.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Urk... I know that, but... grilled squid battered up
Naniwa style is real hard to come by...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But if I'm gonna take care of my body, I can't be
snackin' late at night... Gotta... resist... the
temptation!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fighting against her instincts, Tamamo Cross
resists the urge to try the tempting grilled squid.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You really get it! Holdin' back's the worst thing ya
can do! No doubt!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hang tight, I'm gonna go grab some! Oh, and I'd
better grab an extra helping for Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so Tamamo Cross gets her grilled squid and
comes away with both a full stomach and a full
heart.
